summary: Fixed enforce-mode orphaned-descendant bug: identity-capture timeout hardcoded at 1000ms with zero retry caused permanent osStartIdentity=null under load, skipping taskkill entirely (verified via manual repro: Start-Process-detached grandchild survived session delete). Fix: configurable timeout (session.processCleanup.identityProbeTimeoutMs, default 3000ms), bounded retry (max 3, backoff 200/400ms, finalize-safe), 3 observability counters. TDD red->green, formal review + prickly review both CRITICAL=0/HIGH=0 (4 MEDIUM residual-limitation findings documented, not blocking). Full suite 315/315, tsc 0 errors. Synced to SRS via kiwi-srs-sync.
